title: Adriana
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Adriana}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Tatoo_system.png]] |name=Adriana
Occupying the outermost orbit in a diagram of the Tatoo system |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=*[[Spice Triangle/Legends|Spice Triangle]] **[[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] |system=[[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] |coordinates=R-16 |xyz= |distance= |suns=2: [[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]], [[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]] |orbited= |position=3 |moons=4 |routes=*[[Old Corellian Run]] *[[The Crystal Passage/Legends|The Crystal Passage]] *[[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Gas giant/Legends|Gas giant]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Adriana's ice rings]] {{C|in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]}}''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=[[Water/Legends|Ice]]{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Garouf Lafoe}} |affiliation= }} '''Adriana''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located within the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by several [[Adriana's ice rings|rings]] consisting of [[Water/Legends|ice]]. That ice was often [[Mining/Legends|mined]] and transported to the nearby [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], for which it was the most important source of water. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Garouf Lafoe/Legends|Garouf Lafoe]] was importing ice from Adriana's [[Planetary ring/Legends|rings]] and selling it to Tatooine's inhabitants. ==Description== Adriana was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A part of the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]], which was located in the regions known as the [[Spice Triangle/Legends|Spice Triangle]] and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]], Adriana lay on the crossroads of the [[Old Corellian Run]] and the [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]]. The Old Corellian Run connected the planet to the [[Utaruun system/Legends|Utaruun]] and [[Obana system/Legends|Obana systems]], while the Triellus Trade Route linked Adriana to the [[Andooweel system/Legends|Andooweel]] and [[Ooo-temiuk system/Legends|Ooo-temiuk systems]]. A smaller [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route known as [[The Crystal Passage/Legends|The Crystal Passage]] linked the [[Gas/Legends|gas]] giant to the [[Geonosis system/Legends|Geonosis system]]. Adriana occupied the third and outermost [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Binary star system/Legends|binary star]] pair of [[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]] and [[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]]. Four lifeless [[Moon/Legends|moons]] circled the gas giant itself. Adriana was also orbited by several [[Adriana's ice rings|rings]] composed of [[Water/Legends|ice]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Adriana had never been able to support life.{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010510a|text=The Storm's Edge|int=The Storm's Edge}} ==History== Adriana's [[Planetary ring/Legends|rings]] were often [[Mining/Legends|mined]] for ice,{{CSWECite|I|12|Adriana}} chunks of which were transported to the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]—the innermost world of the Tatoo [[Star system/Legends|system]]. The ice was subsequently sold to Tatooine's inhabitants as the planet's main source of water. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],According to {{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Garouf Lafoe}}, [[Garouf Lafoe/Legends|Garouf Lafoe]] worked as a [[free-trader]] during the early events of {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Garouf Lafoe/Legends|Garouf Lafoe]] worked as a [[free-trader]] on Tatooine, importing ice from Adriana's rings and selling it to the desert planet's inhabitants. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Galaxy_Guide_7_Mos_Eisley.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Adriana was first mentioned in ''Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley''.]] Adriana was introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'', a [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement book that was authored by [[Martin Wixted]] and published in [[1993]]. The article "[[The InQuest World Guide to Tatooine]]" in the [[March]] [[1997]] [[InQuest 23|twenty-third issue]] of the [[InQuest Gamer|''InQuest'']] magazine misspelled the planet's name as "Adrianna." Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,{{InQuestCite|23|The InQuest World Guide to Tatooine}} it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.{{UnlicensedStatus}} Similarly, the [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 16|sixteenth issue]] of [[De Agostini]]'s ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' magazine,{{FactFile|16|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} which was written by [[Iain Lowson]]{{LinkedIn|url=in/iainlowson|text=Iain Lowson|archivefile=File:IainLowson-LinkedIn.png}} and published around [[April 17]], [[2002]],{{FFdates|16}} erroneously spelled the name as "Adiana." That typo was also carried over to the magazine's [[2013]]{{FactFile2013|2|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} and [[2014]] [[The Official Star Wars Fact File (2013)|remake]] [[The Official Star Wars Fact File (2014)|editions]]{{FactFile2014|2|0 ABY 11-14|The Hunt for the Droids}} that were also written by Lowson. Adriana was first illustrated in a schematic of the Tatoo system for [[The Holonet]] feature of the [http://www.swtor.com official website] for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'',{{HolonetOld|planets|tatooine|Tatooine}} a [[2011]] [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[BioWare]].''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' Since its establishment in [[2008]], ''The Old Republic''{{'s}} website has gone through a number of changes, resulting in the removal of some of the features and images that were originally located there, including the aforementioned schematic. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tatoo system, and therefore Adriana, in grid square R-16. ==Appearances== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010510a|text=The Storm's Edge|int=The Storm's Edge}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' *{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Garouf Lafoe}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' *{{FactFile|16|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} {{ID|Adiana}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{HolonetOld|planets|tatooine|Tatooine}} {{1stp}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile2013|2|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} {{ID|Adiana}} *{{FactFile2014|2|0 ABY 11-14|The Hunt for the Droids}} {{ID|Adiana}} ===Non-canon sources=== *{{InQuestCite|23|The InQuest World Guide to Tatooine}} {{Un}} {{ID|Adrianna}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Adriana |es=Adriana |nl=Adriana |pl=Adriana }} [[Category:Gas giants]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Tatoo system locations]]
